---
title: ""
image: "../../images/py_kurs_cover09.webp"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
page-layout: full
---

<br>

::: {.d-flex .gap-2}
[Home](../../index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[Python Overview](../index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[1](./01basics1.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[2](./02basics2.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[3](./03basics3.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[4](./04basics4.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[5](./05pandas1.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[6](./06pandas2.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[7](./07Visualisations.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[8](./08WrapUp_Refresher.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[9](./09QA_SampleExam.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::

# Week 9: Q&A and Sample Exam
*The foundation of your Python journey.*

::: {layout-ncol=1}
### (Exam Preparation)
* **Test Exam Environment**
* **General Q&A**

### (Sample Exam HWS 2025)
* [**Exam for Schlüsselqualifikation**](https://stads-python-course.github.io/assets/docs/sample_exam_2025.pdf){.new-tab}

### (Sample Exam HWS 2024) (optional)
* [**Exam for Schlüsselqualifikation**](https://stads-python-course.github.io/assets/docs/sample_exam_sq.pdf){.new-tab}
* [**Exam for Certificate (German)**](https://stads-python-course.github.io/assets/docs/sample_exam_cert_de.pdf){.new-tab}
* [**Exam for Certificate (English)**](https://stads-python-course.github.io/assets/docs/sample_exam_cert_en.pdf){.new-tab}

### (Q&A)
* **Sample Exam Q&A (no full review)**
:::

## Resources

::: {layout-ncol=2}
[GitHub Repo](https://www.github.com/STADS-Mannheim/python-course-2025/tree/main){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg .w-100 .new-tab}

[w3schools Tutorial](https://www.w3schools.com/python/){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg .w-100 .new-tab}
:::
